name: copilot-completions
description: Code completion powered by LLM — GHOST (FIM) and NES (Next Edit Suggestion)

commands.title: CC Completion: Set GHOST API Key (secure storage)
CC Completion: Set NES API Key (secure storage)
CC Completion: Clear GHOST API Key
CC Completion: Clear NES API Key

cc-completion.ghost.apiKey.markdownDescription: **Read-only.** API keys are stored in OS-managed secure storage. To set or change the GHOST API key, run the command **CC Completion: Set GHOST API Key (secure storage)** from the command palette. Any value here will be auto-cleared after activation.

cc-completion.ghost.promptTemplate.description: FIM prompt template. Use {prefix} and {suffix} placeholders.

cc-completion.ghost.capabilities.limits..description: Max output tokens for GHOST (hard cap)
Debounce window (ms). Waits this long after the last keystroke before firing a new GHOST request.
Max time (ms) an in-flight request gets to finish after the user types again. Increase for slow LLMs.

cc-completion.ghost.suffixOverlapThresho.description: Suffix overlap similarity threshold for GHOST completion trimming

cc-completion.ghost.suffixOverlapType.description: Suffix overlap detection type for GHOST

cc-completion.ghost.presencePenalty.description: Presence penalty for GHOST completions (-2.0 to 2.0). Positive values penalize new tokens based on whether they appear in the text so far, increasing the model's likelihood to talk about new topics.

cc-completion.ghost.frequencyPenalty.description: Frequency penalty for GHOST completions (-2.0 to 2.0). Positive values penalize new tokens based on their existing frequency in the text so far, decreasing the model's likelihood to repeat the same line verbatim.

cc-completion.ghost.stream.description: Enable SSE streaming for GHOST completions

cc-completion.ghost.contextScoping.description: Context gathering mode for GHOST: 'basic' sends raw prefix/suffix; 'lsp' adds LSP scope info and file exports.

cc-completion.context.lspCacheMaxEntries.description: Max entries in the LSP symbol cache. Higher values cache more files at the cost of memory.

cc-completion.context.workspaceIndexMode.description: Symbol indexing scope: 'off' disables all LSP context; 'opened-files' queries only the file at cursor; 'workspace' (default) builds a full workspace symbol index for cross-file context.

cc-completion.context.autoImportEnabled.description: Phase H: detect missing imports via LSP diagnostics and surface auto-import suggestions as NES inline completion items with additionalTextEdits.

cc-completion.context.hoverEnrichmentEna.description: Phase C: enrich import resolutions with hover-derived type signatures (vscode.executeHoverProvider).

cc-completion.context.typeHierarchyEnabl.description: Phase G: query LSP type hierarchy for super-types of the enclosing class/interface (OOP languages).

cc-completion.context.lspNotifyEnabled.description: Phase D: notify the user once per hour per language when no LSP is installed.

cc-completion.nes.contextScoping.description: Context gathering mode for NES: 'basic' sends raw prompt; 'lsp' adds LSP scope info, file exports, and statement-end detection.

cc-completion.nes.apiKey.markdownDescription: **Read-only.** API keys are stored in OS-managed secure storage. To set or change the NES API key, run the command **CC Completion: Set NES API Key (secure storage)** from the command palette. Any value here will be auto-cleared after activation.

cc-completion.nes.family.description: Model family for NES thinking mode

cc-completion.nes.capabilities.limits.ma.description: Max output tokens for NES (hard cap)

cc-completion.nes.capabilities.limits.de.description: Debounce delay (ms) before firing a NES request. Shared with GHOST — user typing in either pipeline resets the same timer.

cc-completion.nes.capabilities.limits.re.description: Maximum time (ms) to wait for a NES response before aborting the request.

cc-completion.nes.suffixOverlapThreshold.description: Suffix overlap similarity threshold for NES response trimming

cc-completion.nes.presencePenalty.description: Presence penalty for NES (-2.0 to 2.0). Positive values penalize new tokens based on whether they appear in the text so far.

cc-completion.nes.frequencyPenalty.description: Frequency penalty for NES (-2.0 to 2.0). Positive values penalize new tokens based on their existing frequency.

cc-completion.logging.enabled.description: Enable verbose output logging to the CC Completion output channel. Toggle via the CC status bar quick pick.

scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
scripts.test: echo 'Run "CC Completion: Run Diagnostics" in VS Code instead. The vscode-test CLI is not used — diagnostics run in the live extension host.'
